description_long: This is a stylized bottle with a wide, octagonal body made of a translucent material, likely glass or plastic, and a prominent brown cap resembling a cork. The bottle sits on a circular, orange-brown base that mimics a patch of ground with small, low-poly green trees and gray rocks, suggesting a decorative or thematic display. Around the midsection of the bottle is a dark blue label with white, blocky symbols and graphics, including what appears to be a cow and some stylized text. The bottle's body is mostly clear, allowing partial visibility of the interior, but no liquid is visible inside. The cap is conical and appears to be removable, serving as the main interactive part. The overall design is playful and geometric, with a matte finish and minimal surface detail.
description: A stylized, translucent bottle with a brown conical cap, blue label with white graphics, and set on a decorative base with trees and rocks. The bottle is clear, with no visible liquid inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bottle's clear body, brown cap, and the blue label with no visible graphics; the base with trees and rocks is prominent.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the bottle's side and the label wrapping around, still no visible graphics on the label from this angle.
description_view_2: Side view where part of the white blocky text or symbols on the blue label becomes visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the most detailed part of the label, including a white cow graphic and additional stylized text.
attribute_label_or_branding: A blue label with white, blocky symbols and graphics, including a cow and stylized text, wraps around the bottle's midsection.
